LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol.description: The 10mm Pistol is a semi-automatic sidearm chambered for 10mm rounds. Favored for its reliability and stopping power, it is a common sight among wastelanders and pre-war security forces alike.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol.label: 10mm Pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol_MkII.description: An improved version of the classic 10mm Pistol, featuring enhanced reliability and accuracy. Favored by elite wastelanders and pre-war security forces.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol_MkII.label: 10mm Pistol MkII
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol_MkII.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol_MkII.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_SMG.description: The 10mm SMG is a compact, fully automatic submachine gun chambered for 10mm rounds. Known for its high rate of fire and ease of use, it is ideal for close-quarters combat but sacrifices accuracy at longer ranges.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_SMG.label: 10mm SMG
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_SMG.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_SMG.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_Pistol.description: The 12.7mm Pistol is a heavy, semi-automatic sidearm chambered for 12.7mm rounds. Its immense stopping power and armor penetration make it a favorite among wasteland enforcers, but its weight and recoil require a strong hand.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_Pistol.label: 12.7mm Pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_SMG.description: The 12.7mm SMG is a powerful, fully automatic submachine gun chambered for 12.7mm rounds. Known for its high damage output and rapid rate of fire, it is devastating in close-quarters combat but suffers from heavy recoil and limited accuracy at range.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_SMG.label: 12.7mm SMG
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_SMG.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_SMG.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_14mm_Pistol.description: The 14mm Pistol is a powerful sidearm chambered for 14mm rounds, offering exceptional stopping power and penetration. Rare and highly sought after in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_14mm_Pistol.label: 14mm Pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_14mm_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_14mm_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Pistol.description: The .223 Pistol is a unique sidearm chambered for .223 rifle rounds, offering high velocity and accuracy. Its design is favored by marksmen and collectors.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Pistol.label: .223 Pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Rangemaster.description: The .223 Rangemaster is a precision bolt-action rifle chambered for .223 rounds. Favored by marksmen for its high accuracy and range, it is a reliable choice for hunting and long-range engagements in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Rangemaster.label: .223 Rangemaster Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Rangemaster.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Rangemaster.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Rifle.description: The .223 Rifle is a lightweight, semi-automatic rifle chambered for .223 rounds. Known for its accuracy and low recoil, it is a popular choice for both hunting and combat in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Rifle.label: .223 Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Rifle.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Rifle.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_32_Hunting_Rifle.description: The .32 Hunting Rifle is a pre-war bolt-action rifle chambered for .32 caliber rounds. Known for its simplicity and reliability, it is a common weapon among wastelanders, offering decent accuracy and stopping power for medium-range engagements.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_32_Hunting_Rifle.label: .32 Hunting Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_32_Hunting_Rifle.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_32_Hunting_Rifle.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_357_Revolver.description: The .357 Revolver is a classic, six-shot sidearm chambered for .357 Magnum rounds. Renowned for its reliability and stopping power, it is a favored weapon among lawmen and gunslingers in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_357_Revolver.label: .357 Revolver
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_357_Revolver.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_357_Revolver.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_44Magnum_Revolver.description: The .44 Magnum Revolver is a powerful, six-shot sidearm chambered for .44 Magnum rounds. Renowned for its high stopping power and intimidating presence, it is a prized weapon among wasteland hunters and enforcers.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_44Magnum_Revolver.label: .44 Magnum Revolver
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_44Magnum_Revolver.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_44Magnum_Revolver.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_556_Pistol.description: The 5.56mm Pistol is a rare, high-powered sidearm chambered for 5.56mm rifle rounds. Its unique design offers superior penetration and range compared to typical pistols, but with increased recoil and wear.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_556_Pistol.label: 5.56mm Pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_556_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_556_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_Pistol.description: The 9mm Pistol is a lightweight, semi-automatic sidearm chambered for 9mm rounds. Its low recoil and plentiful ammunition make it a popular choice for both civilians and wastelanders, though it lacks the stopping power of larger calibers.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_Pistol.label: 9mm Pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_SMG.description: The 9mm SMG is a lightweight, fully automatic submachine gun chambered for 9mm rounds. Known for its ease of use and high rate of fire, it is effective in close-quarters combat but lacks stopping power and accuracy at longer ranges.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_SMG.label: 9mm SMG
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_SMG.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_SMG.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AbileneKidLEBBGun.description: A rare, limited edition BB gun crafted for the Abilene Kid. Distinguished by its unique markings and exceptional craftsmanship, it is prized by collectors and marksmen for its nostalgic value and precision.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AbileneKidLEBBGun.label: Abilene Kid LE BB Gun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AK_112_AR.description: The AK-112 is a robust, pre-war assault rifle chambered for 5.56mm rounds. Known for its reliability and ease of maintenance, it remains a popular choice among wasteland survivors.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AK_112_AR.label: AK-112 Assault Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AK_112_AR.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AK_112_AR.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AllAmerican.description: All-American is a legendary marksman carbine renowned for its exceptional accuracy, reliability, and custom craftsmanship. Featuring a unique design and advanced optics, it excels at delivering precise, rapid bursts at long range, making it a prized weapon among elite marksmen and collectors alike.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AllAmerican.label: All-American
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Assault_Carbine.description: A compact, fully automatic carbine chambered for 5mm rounds. Designed for military use, it offers a high rate of fire and excellent handling, making it ideal for close-quarters combat and suppressive fire.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Assault_Carbine.label: Assault Carbine
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Assault_Carbine.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Assault_Carbine.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_BB_Gun.description: A simple air-powered BB gun. While not lethal, it can sting and is often used for training or pest control. Not recommended for serious combat.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_BB_Gun.label: BB Gun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_BB_Gun.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_BB_Gun.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_BigBoomer.description: Big Boomer is a legendary, custom double-barrel shotgun renowned for its immense stopping power and rugged craftsmanship. Its reinforced frame and oversized barrels deliver devastating close-range blasts, making it a prized weapon among wasteland hunters and collectors alike.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_BigBoomer.label: Big Boomer
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Brush_Gun.description: The Brush Gun is a lever-action rifle chambered for .45-70 Government rounds. Favored for its high stopping power and reliability, it is a popular choice among wasteland hunters and marksmen for taking down large game and armored targets.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Brush_Gun.label: Brush Gun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Brush_Gun.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Brush_Gun.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Caravan_Shotgun.description: A double-barreled, break-action shotgun popular with caravan guards and traders. Its simple design makes it easy to repair and maintain, but it suffers from a slow reload and limited range
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Caravan_Shotgun.label: Caravan Shotgun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Caravan_Shotgun.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Caravan_Shotgun.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Chinese_Assault_Rifle.descriptio: A rugged and powerful assault rifle of Chinese origin. It was widely used by Chinese forces during the Sino-American War, known for its high damage output and reliability in harsh conditions.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Chinese_Assault_Rifle.label: Chinese Assault Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Chinese_Pistol.description: The Chinese Pistol is a compact, semi-automatic sidearm chambered for 9mm rounds. Manufactured before the Great War, it is lightweight and easy to conceal, but suffers from low stopping power and questionable reliability.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Chinese_Pistol.label: Chinese Pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Chinese_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Chinese_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_ChunkyBoi.description: A massive, custom heavy weapon designed for maximum firepower and intimidation.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_ChunkyBoi.label: Chunky Boi
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_ChunkyBoi.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Citykiller.description: The Citykiller is a high-capacity, semi-automatic shotgun designed for urban combat. Its rapid fire and large magazine make it devastating in close quarters.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Citykiller.label: Citykiller Shotgun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Citykiller.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Citykiller.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Colt_6520_Pistol.description: The Colt 6520 is a classic pre-war sidearm, renowned for its reliability and ease of use. Chambered for .45 rounds, it remains a favorite among wasteland survivors.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Colt_6520_Pistol.label: Colt 6520
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Colt_6520_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Colt_6520_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Combat_Rifle_Standard.descriptio: The standard combat rifle is a rugged, semi-automatic rifle chambered for .45 ACP rounds. Reliable and versatile, it is a favorite among wastelanders for its balance of firepower, accuracy, and durability.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Combat_Rifle_Standard.label: Combat Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Combat_Shotgun.description: The Combat Shotgun is a semi-automatic, magazine-fed shotgun chambered for 12 gauge shells. Designed for military and law enforcement, it offers a high rate of fire and reliability in close-quarters combat, making it a favorite among wasteland enforcers.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Combat_Shotgun.label: Combat Shotgun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Combat_Shotgun.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Combat_Shotgun.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Combat_Shotgun_MkII.description: An advanced version of the Combat Shotgun, featuring improved reliability, accuracy, and rate of fire. Favored by elite military units and wasteland enforcers.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Combat_Shotgun_MkII.label: Combat Shotgun MkII
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Cowboy_Repeater.description: A classic lever-action rifle chambered for .357 rounds. The Cowboy Repeater is lightweight, reliable, and favored by marksmen and wanderers alike for its fast cycling and respectable accuracy.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Cowboy_Repeater.label: Cowboy Repeater
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Cowboy_Repeater.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Cowboy_Repeater.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Deagle.description: The Deagle is a massive, semi-automatic pistol chambered for .50 AE rounds. Its intimidating size and firepower make it a symbol of status and strength in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Deagle.label: Deagle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Deagle.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Deagle.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Deliverer.description: Deliverer is a legendary, compact 10mm pistol renowned for its exceptional rate of fire and lightweight design. Favored by covert operatives, it features a custom suppressor and ergonomic grip, making it ideal for stealth operations and rapid engagements in close quarters.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Deliverer.label: Deliverer
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_DinnerBell.description: Dinner Bell is a unique, custom pump-action shotgun prized for its exceptional reliability and stopping power. Featuring a polished finish and precision modifications, it delivers tight shot groupings and increased damage, making it the weapon of choice for seasoned wasteland hunters seeking both performance and style.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_DinnerBell.label: Dinner Bell
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_DKS_501_Sniper_Rifle.description: The DKS-501 is a pre-war bolt-action sniper rifle chambered for .308 rounds. Known for its exceptional accuracy and stopping power, it is a favorite among marksmen for long-range engagements.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_DKS_501_Sniper_Rifle.label: DKS-501 Sniper Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_G11_AR.description: The G11 is a revolutionary German assault rifle using caseless ammunition. Its high rate of fire and advanced design make it a rare but highly sought-after weapon in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_G11_AR.label: G11 Assault Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_G11_AR.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_G11_AR.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_GobiCampaignScoutRifle.descripti: The Gobi Campaign Scout Rifle is a legendary, custom sniper rifle awarded to elite marksmen. Renowned for its lightweight frame, exceptional accuracy, and rapid handling, it stands as one of the most coveted long-range weapons in the wasteland. Its unique craftsmanship and storied history make it a prized possession among sharpshooters and collectors alike.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_GobiCampaignScoutRifle.label: Gobi Campaign Scout Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_HHToolsNailgun.description: A rugged, industrial nailgun adapted for both construction and combat. Its heavy frame and rapid-fire capability make it a formidable improvised weapon, favored by those who value versatility and raw stopping power.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_HHToolsNailgun.label: HH Tools Nailgun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_HK_10_SMG.description: The HK-10 is a modern, compact submachine gun known for its reliability and high rate of fire. Favored by security forces and elite units for urban operations.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_HK_10_SMG.label: HK-10 SMG
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_HK_10_SMG.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_HK_10_SMG.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Revolver.description: The Hunting Revolver is a large, single-action revolver chambered for .45-70 Government rounds. Designed for hunting big game, it delivers devastating power and accuracy, but its heavy frame and slow rate of fire make it unwieldy in close combat.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Revolver.label: Hunting Revolver
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Revolver.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Revolver.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Shotgun.description: A pump-action shotgun designed for hunting game. Favored for its rugged construction, high capacity, and reliability in the harshest wasteland conditions.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Shotgun.label: Hunting Shotgun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Shotgun.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Hunting_Shotgun.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Jackhammer.description: The Jackhammer is a fully automatic, drum-fed shotgun capable of unleashing a torrent of shells in seconds. Rare and highly prized, it is a force to be reckoned with in any firefight.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Jackhammer.label: Jackhammer Shotgun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Jackhammer.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Jackhammer.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_LeverAction_Shotgun.description: A classic lever-action shotgun, prized for its fast cycling and reliability. Popular among ranchers and lawmen, it delivers solid stopping power and can be fired rapidly in skilled hands.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_LeverAction_Shotgun.label: Lever-Action Shotgun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Light_Machine_Gun.description: The Light Machine Gun is a pre-war, fully automatic support weapon chambered for 5.56mm rounds. Designed for sustained suppressive fire, it features a high-capacity magazine and a high rate of fire, making it ideal for pinning down enemies and providing covering fire in open combat.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Light_Machine_Gun.label: Light Machine Gun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Light_Machine_Gun.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Light_Machine_Gun.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_LincolnsRepeater.description: Lincoln's Repeater is a legendary lever-action rifle, renowned for its exceptional craftsmanship and historical significance. With its polished finish and unmatched accuracy, this weapon stands as a symbol of freedom and precision, making it a prized possession among collectors and marksmen alike.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_LincolnsRepeater.label: Lincoln's Repeater
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Lucky.description: Lucky is a legendary .357 Magnum revolver, distinguished by its immaculate chrome finish and ornate engravings. Renowned for its flawless action and uncanny accuracy, this weapon is favored by gunslingers who trust in both skill and fortune to carry the day.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Lucky.label: Lucky
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Maria.description: Maria is a beautifully engraved 9mm pistol, adorned with intricate silver inlays and a pearl grip. Once belonging to a figure of legend, it combines elegance with deadly precision, making it a prized weapon for those who value both style and performance.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Maria.label: Maria
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Marksman_Carbine.description: A lightweight, semi-automatic carbine chambered for 5.56mm rounds. Designed for precision and medium-range engagements, it was favored by NCR marksmen for its accuracy and reliability.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Marksman_Carbine.label: Marksman Carbine
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Marksman_Carbine.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Marksman_Carbine.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Minigun.description: The Minigun is a multi-barrel, rotary machine gun capable of firing 5mm rounds at an extremely high rate. Its devastating firepower makes it a favorite for heavy support roles, but its weight and bulk limit mobility.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Minigun.label: Minigun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Minigun.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_MkI_Avenger.description: An early model Avenger heavy weapon, known for its high rate of fire and reliability.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_MkI_Avenger.label: MkI Avenger
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_MkI_Avenger.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_MkIIAvenger.description: The MkII Avenger is a legendary minigun chambered in 5mm, renowned for its devastating rate of fire and rugged reliability. Favored by elite operatives, its advanced design and custom modifications make it one of the most formidable automatic weapons in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_MkIIAvenger.label: MkII Avenger
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_OlPainless.description: Ol' Painless is a legendary hunting rifle, renowned for its exceptional accuracy and lightweight design. Passed down through generations, this rifle combines reliability with precision, making it a prized weapon for any marksman.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_OlPainless.label: Ol' Painless
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_BoltAction.description: A crude, homemade bolt-action rifle assembled from scavenged pipes and scrap metal. While slow to fire and lacking in power compared to proper rifles, it is easy to produce and maintain, making it a common weapon among wasteland survivors.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_BoltAction.label: Pipe Bolt-Action
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_BoltAction.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_BoltAction.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Pistol.description: A crude, homemade pistol cobbled together from scavenged pipes and scrap metal. While unreliable and lacking in stopping power, it is easy to craft and maintain, making it a common sidearm among the most desperate wastelanders.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Pistol.label: Pipe Pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Revolver.description: A crude, homemade revolver assembled from scavenged pipes and scrap metal. While unreliable and slow to reload, it is easy to craft and maintain, making it a common sidearm among wasteland survivors.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Revolver.label: Pipe Revolver
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Revolver.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Revolver.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Rifle.description: A crude, homemade semi-automatic rifle assembled from scavenged pipes and scrap metal. While unreliable and inaccurate, it offers decent firepower for its simple construction, making it popular among raiders and settlers alike.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Rifle.label: Pipe Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Rifle.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Rifle.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Shotgun.description: A crude, single-shot shotgun cobbled together from pipes and scrap. Devastating at close range but slow to reload, it's a favorite among desperate wastelanders who need stopping power on a budget.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Shotgun.label: Pipe Shotgun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Shotgun.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Shotgun.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Sniper.description: A crude, long-barreled pipe rifle fitted with a makeshift scope. While nowhere near as accurate as a proper sniper rifle, it offers improved range for wastelanders who can't afford better equipment.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Sniper.label: Pipe Sniper Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Sniper.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Sniper.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Power_Armor_Assault_Rifle.descri: The Assault Rifle is a pre-war, fully automatic rifle chambered for 5.56mm rounds. Its distinctive drum magazine and robust construction make it a favorite for sustained fire in the wasteland, though it is heavy and unwieldy compared to more modern designs requiring the use of power armor.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Power_Armor_Assault_Rifle.label: Power Armor Assault Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_R91_Rifle.description: The R-91 is a pre-war, fully automatic assault rifle chambered for 5.56mm rounds. It was the standard-issue rifle for the U.S. Armed Forces before the Great War, known for its reliability and versatility in combat.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_R91_Rifle.label: R-91 Assault Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_R91_Rifle.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_R91_Rifle.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Ratslayer.description: Ratslayer is a unique, silenced varmint rifle equipped with a custom scope and lightweight frame. Renowned for its exceptional accuracy and stealth, it excels at eliminating small targets from a distance without drawing attention. Its precision engineering and quiet operation make it a favorite among marksmen and hunters alike.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Ratslayer.label: Ratslayer
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_ReservistsRifle.description: Reservist's Rifle is a rare, finely-crafted sniper rifle once carried by an elite military marksman. Lightweight and exceptionally accurate, it is prized for its long-range precision and quick handling, making it a coveted weapon among sharpshooters and collectors alike.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_ReservistsRifle.label: Reservist's Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Riot_Shotgun.description: This pre-War, semi-automatic combat shotgun was designed for law enforcement and military use. Its high rate of fire and large magazine make it devastating in close-quarters combat.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Riot_Shotgun.label: Riot Shotgun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Riot_Shotgun.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Riot_Shotgun.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_SawnOff_Shotgun.description: A double-barreled shotgun with the barrels and stock cut down for easier concealment. Extremely deadly at point-blank range, but wildly inaccurate and short-ranged.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_SawnOff_Shotgun.label: Sawn-Off Shotgun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_SawnOff_Shotgun.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_SawnOff_Shotgun.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Scoped_Hunting_Rifle.description: The Scoped Hunting Rifle is a pre-war bolt-action rifle chambered for .308 rounds. Equipped with a scope, it is highly accurate and effective for medium to long-range engagements, making it a reliable choice for hunters and marksmen alike.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Scoped_Hunting_Rifle.label: Scoped Hunting Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_10mm_Pistol.description: The Silenced 10mm Pistol is a semi-automatic sidearm chambered for 10mm rounds and fitted with an integral suppressor. Favored by assassins and covert operatives, it offers a balance of stopping power and stealth.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_10mm_Pistol.label: Silenced 10mm Pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_Pistol.description: The Silenced .22 Pistol is a lightweight, semi-automatic sidearm chambered for .22 LR rounds and equipped with an integral suppressor. Extremely quiet and easy to control, it is favored for stealth operations but lacks stopping power.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_Pistol.label: Silenced .22 Pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_SMG.description: A lightweight, fully automatic submachine gun chambered for .22 LR rounds and equipped with an integral suppressor. Extremely quiet and easy to control, but lacks stopping power compared to larger calibers.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_SMG.label: Silenced .22 SMG
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_SMG.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_SMG.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Single_Shotgun.description: A simple, single-barrel break-action shotgun. Cheap to produce and easy to maintain, but slow to reload and limited to one shot at a time.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Single_Shotgun.label: Single Shotgun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Single_Shotgun.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Single_Shotgun.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Trail_Carbine.description: The Trail Carbine is a lever-action rifle chambered for .44 Magnum rounds. Renowned for its ruggedness and accuracy, it is a favorite among wasteland scouts and hunters for its fast cycling and reliable stopping power.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Trail_Carbine.label: Trail Carbine
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Trail_Carbine.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Trail_Carbine.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Vances9mmSMG.description: Vance's 9mm SMG is a legendary submachine gun, expertly customized for rapid fire and superior handling. Its polished finish and unique engravings set it apart, while its enhanced accuracy and reliability make it a prized weapon among collectors and gunslingers alike.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Vances9mmSMG.label: Vance's 9mm SMG
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Varmint_Rifle.description: The Varmint Rifle is a lightweight, bolt-action rifle chambered for .223 rounds. Originally designed for pest control and small game hunting, it is accurate and easy to handle, but lacks the stopping power of larger rifles.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Varmint_Rifle.label: Varmint Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Varmint_Rifle.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Varmint_Rifle.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_VictoryRifle.description: The Victory Rifle is a legendary, custom sniper rifle renowned for its exceptional stopping power and unique knockdown capability. Its reinforced frame and precision engineering make it a prized weapon among sharpshooters, able to deliver devastating shots at extreme range while reliably staggering targets.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_VictoryRifle.label: Victory Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Vindicator.description: A powerful heavy weapon, designed for maximum suppression and area denial.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Vindicator.label: Vindicator
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Vindicator.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Wanda.description: Wanda is a unique, custom combat shotgun from the Capital Wasteland. Distinguished by its green finish and reliability, it features a faster firing rate and lighter weight compared to standard combat shotguns. Favored by those who value speed and dependability in close-quarters combat.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Wanda.label: Wanda
